evidence: Self-reported as a barber at Sgro's Barbershop, Cleveland OH 44128. However, the shop's public 'Our Team' page does not list a Christopher Anderson, and 'Christopher Anderson' is a very common name, so the specific individual could not be confirmed. The high FEC donation count attributed to this name (272) is likely a name-collision artifact and was not verified as this person.

evidence: Hector Nieto is the Public Information Officer / Communications Director for Travis County government in Austin, confirmed by Travis County's own postings and directory listings (traviscountytx.gov email domain). name: Moonesinghe, Mark
resolved_employer: inKind (Austin-based restaurant-financing/hospitality fintech) — Director, Restaurant Relations
evidence: Mark J. Moonesinghe is Director of Restaurant Relations at inKind, the Austin-based restaurant capital/hospitality-fintech company, corroborated by his LinkedIn headline and by business-directory listings (ZoomInfo, Lead411) showing an @inkind.com address and Austin location. Surname is rare and the filing's employer 'Inkind' plus Austin ZIP 78731 match exactly. Prior career was healthcare IT at Baylor Scott & White Health. DISCREPANCY FLAGGED: the filing lists occupation 'Owner', but every public source shows him as a salaried Director, not an owner or principal — inKind was co-founded by Johann and the late Rajan Moonesinghe. 'Owner' appears to be self-reported filing imprecision; it does not indicate a documented ownership stake. FEC PAC search and Texas Ethics Commission lobbyist search both returned no match. NOTE: record-level FEC retrieval via api.open.fec.gov was blocked (DEMO_KEY HTTP 429) and OpenSecrets returned HTTP 403; FEC checking was done via web search instead.

Full bio-page reads found one board seat (below) and no ties to Israel/Palestine advocacy on either side, oil and gas, gun-rights, gun-control, or defense-contractor organizations. name: Hayes-McMahon, Shellie
resolved_employer: Planned Parenthood Texas Votes (PPTV) — Executive Director
evidence: Confirmed: 'PPTV' in the filing resolves to Planned Parenthood Texas Votes, where Shellie Hayes-McMahon is Executive Director — matching the filing's 'ED' occupation exactly. She joined Planned Parenthood Advocates of Texas in 2021 as Deputy Executive Director of Operations and Development and was named Co-Executive Director in February 2023; previously Operations Director at Annie's List. The Cedar Park ZIP 78613 sits in Williamson County, independently corroborated by her documented role as Treasurer and Senior Advisor of the Williamson County Democratic Party. She is NOT personally a registered Texas lobbyist — she is absent from the TEC registered-lobbyist lists, and PPTV's registered lobbyist of record for 2025-2026 is Darcy Caballero (TEC ID 87494). Balanced-spectrum search found no affiliation on either side of the Israel/Palestine spectrum, and none with oil and gas, gun-rights, gun-control, or defense-contractor organizations. NOTE: record-level FEC retrieval was blocked (api.open.fec.gov DEMO_KEY HTTP 429; OpenSecrets HTTP 403), so no individual PAC recipients could be independently verified.

affiliations.role: Executive Director (Deputy ED for Operations & Development 2021; Co-Executive Director from Feb 2023)

Served as Operations Director for Annie's List, 'managing the organization's ongoing operations to ensure the execution of its mission to elect Texas women to office.'
